title: Lady Gangster
desc: A software engineer gets married to a lady gangster, unaware of her past life of crime.

title: Maari
desc: Maariyappan tries to defeat his rival and also cope with his son's questionable actions.

title: Lakshya
desc: Karan, a spoiled teen, joins Indian Army on a whim, quits after hardship, conflicts with his girlfriend, then reenlists, becoming an officer as war erupts.

title: Jungle Book
desc: A young boy is raised by the wolves in a jungle. Later, when a man-eating tiger threatens his life, his animal family convinces him to leave their habitat and get acquainted with the human world.

title: Vir The Robot Boy
desc: Vir is a robot boy with emotions and powers. With friends Chulbul, Imli, and magical Gintu, he fights villains, saves lives, and proves true strength lies in kindness.
